name: smb-sales-intelligence-mcp
title: SMB Sales Intelligence MCP for AI SDRs
description: Battle-tested B2B sales playbooks for AI agents. 10 callable tools: discovery scripts, objection handling, follow-up sequences, 7 closing styles, 3-option pricing framework, EMEA market intelligence (UK/IE/ES/DE/FR/NL/Nordics), cold email templates, call scripts. Built from 10 years of enterprise sales at Criteo (268% quota), Deel ($12B), HBO, Bloomberg.
